title: Get authorized ad accounts
content:
Use this endpoint to obtain a list of advertiser accounts that authorized an app. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path |/v1.2/oauth2/advertiser/get/|/v1.3/oauth2/advertiser/get/ | |Request parameter data type| `app_id`: number | `app_id`: string | |Response parameter data type| `advertiser_id`: number | `advertiser_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth2/advertiser/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |app_id{Required}|string|The App id applied by the developer, which can be found on the
[Application Management](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) page. | |secret{Required}|string|The private key of the developer's application, which can be found on the
[Application Management](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) page.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:" \ --data-urlencode "secret=" \ --data-urlencode "app_id=" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth2/advertiser/get/ (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description | |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code, see [Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097)| |message |string|Return messages, see [Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097) | |data |object|Return data | #|list|object|Advertiser information list| ##|advertiser_id|string|Authorising Advertiser ID| ##|advertiser_name|string|Authorising Advertiser Name| |request_id |string|Request log ID. Uniquely identifying a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": { "list": [ { "advertiser_id": "ADVERTISER_ID", "advertiser_name": "ADVERTISER_NAME" } ] }, "request_id": "202003100820230101890492231E063EE3" } (/code); ```
